seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Aurukun and Avenell Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Aurukun vs Avenell Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Aurukun and Avenell Heights.
heading: Aurukun vs Avenell Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aurukun, Queensland and Avenell Heights, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Avenell Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Aurukun (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aurukun or Avenell Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aurukun has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Avenell Heights scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aurukun scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Avenell Heights scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aurukun or Avenell Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Avenell Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
